raw_text:
OK  [TC-I-002] process_name: CHARACTER(c_char, LEN=32) occupies 32 bytes
    contiguously. C char[32] is 32 bytes contiguously. Memory layout is
    identical. No hidden length argument (BIND(C) suppresses it).

NOTE: Semantically different in Fortran (scalar vs array) but byte-identical
      for interop when BIND(C) is used. No error.
